prestazioni: Engine: 3.0L 6B31 MIVEC V6 (stock code) upgraded with a custom forced-induction kit using a Garrett GTX3071R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) paired with a PWR Australia intercooler (500x220x100mm core) and a Tomei 80mm titanium blow-off valve. Supporting mods include a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust by HKS Hi-Power with a 200-cell catalytic converter delete, and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with a custom flex-fuel map for E85 compatibility.

Suspension: Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (part #DFV 22M401-08) with 8-position adjustable damping, paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (20mm front, 25mm rear) to correct scrub radius. Chassis reinforcement via Cusco front strut tower bar (part #602 540 A) and a custom rear subframe brace by Ultra Racing (part #UR-MI10R).

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (part #MZ1-100) in the rear differential with a 4.11 final drive ratio, paired with a Tilton twin-disc clutch (part #64-1000) and a PTT short shifter (part #PTT-MIT-001) with a 30% reduction in throw. Braking upgraded to DBA 5000 Series rotors (355x32mm front, 330x24mm rear) with AP Racing CP8650 calipers and Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny Outlander-specific widebody kit (part #RB-MIT-001) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear). Rear wing is a custom 1.5m carbon fiber GT-style wing by Voltex (part #VOL-1000) with adjustable angle mounts.

Exterior: Full 3M Matte Military Green (part #35482) wrap with a custom Ralliart heritage stripe kit by Seibon Carbon, including carbon fiber mirror caps and a custom front grille insert with a blacked-out Mitsubishi emblem. Lighting upgraded to Morimoto XB LED headlights (part #XB-H11) and Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog lights (part #404061).

Interior: Full Recaro Pole Position seats (part #390 00 00) in Alcantara with red stitching, paired with a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (part #CC-MIT-001) in 4130 chromoly. Steering wheel replaced with a NRG Innovations R3 (part #NRG-146-350-70R) with a quick-release hub, and gauge cluster upgraded to a Defi Advance BF series (part #DF13001) with oil temp, oil pressure, and boost gauges.
